nasb.text: For He looked down from His holy height; From heaven the Lord gazed upon the earth,

esv.text: that he looked down from his holy height; from heaven the Lord looked at the earth,

cnv.text: 因為耶和華從他至高的聖所裡垂看， 從天上觀看大地，

ccb.text: 耶和华从至高的圣所俯视人间， 从天上察看大地，

csbs.text: “耶和华从他圣洁的至高处俯瞰， 从天上向大地观看；
